description: marking a draft submitted appends a governed state change with its actor and source

input.source: submitted the first cut to the brand

assertions: a history entry is appended with the actor and source
the history is append-only (prior entries are preserved)

description: a waiting-on-payment status computes the nudge and escalate dates
assertions: nudge_date and escalate_date are computed from waiting_since
only a nudge is prepared as a draft; nothing is sent

description: an illegal lifecycle transition is refused without mutating history
assertions: an illegal transition (cancelled -> in_progress) is refused
the append-only history is not mutated on a rejected change
the error names the allowed transitions from the current state
